articles.title: IPL: Mitchell Marsh's record ton makes him LSG's top-five run-getter
articles.description: Mitchell Marsh hit the fastest century for LSG in IPL history, a 49-ball ton, in a match against RCB. He scored 111 off 56 balls, becoming the franchise's fourth-highest run-scorer and securing his second ton for the team.

articles.title: Piyush Goyal, ICFA chair meet to boost farmer welfare, global agri role
articles.description: Piyush Goyal chaired meetings to improve farmer welfare and strengthen India's global agriculture standing. Discussions included cooperation with Africa and a roadmap for obtaining SPS approvals to boost agricultural and fisheries exports.

articles.title: ‘Entirely Inconsistent’: Trump Vs Pope Leo XIV Takes NEW Turn As Florida Bishop Steps Into Clash
articles.description: President Donald Trump is facing backlash from an unexpected place, his own Florida backyard. A Palm Beach bishop publicly defended Pope Leo XIV after Trump accused the pontiff of “endangering Catholics” over Iran comments. The clash comes as Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets Pope Leo at the Vatican amid growing tensions between Trump allies and the Catholic Church. The explosive Pope Leo vs Trump feud is now drawing reactions from religious leaders, political insiders, and critics online.#trump #popeleoxiv #pope #donaldtrump #florida #palmbeach #catholica #marcorubio #vatican #thevatican #trumpnews #vaticannews #popenews #italy

articles.description: FanDuel down: FanDuel apparently experienced a significant server outage on May 7, preventing thousands of users from accessing the sports betting platform. articles.title: Karnataka: HC extends stay on FIR against MLA, election officials till June 3
articles.description: The Bengaluru High Court has extended a stay on an FIR concerning the Sringeri vote recount. The case involves BJP MLA DN Jeevaraj and election officials KN Ramesh and Vedamurthy. The FIR was filed following a complaint about alleged electoral malpractice. The court's decision provides temporary relief to the accused. The Congress party plans to challenge the revised election results.

articles.title: UP Police arrest 10 in 7 encounters across Muzaffarnagar in 24 hours, 9 shot in legs
articles.description: Uttar Pradesh Police arrested 10 accused during seven separate encounters across Muzaffarnagar within 24 hours. Officials said nine of the accused sustained bullet injuries to their legs during exchanges of fire with police teams.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Marcus Aurelius: ‘Never let the future disturb you; you will meet it, if you...’ - Why worrying too much about the future steals peace from the present, explained by the Stoic philosopher
articles.description: Marcus Aurelius Quote of the Day suggests that fear of the future often creates more suffering than the actual challenges themselves. In his famous words from Meditations, the Stoic philosopher reminds people that the same reason, strength, and resilience helping them survive todays struggles will also help them face tomorrows uncertainties. It encourages people to stop overthinking the future and focus on facing the present.

Understanding these core numbers can guide you in navigating love, identifying values, and managing conflicts effectively with potential partners.

articles.title: 'Avatar': James Cameron sued over unauthorized use of actress's face
articles.description: Actress Q'orianka Kilcher has sued James Cameron and Disney, alleging her face was used without consent at age 14 to create the 'Avatar' character Neytiri. The suit claims her likeness was extracted from a photo and used across the franchise.
